docs.freqtrade: Freqtrade is an open-source, Python-based free crypto trading bot framework supporting backtesting and dry-run/live modes via exchange adapters (ccxt).
docs.nautilus_trader: NautilusTrader is an open-source, high-performance algorithmic trading platform written in Python/Rust supporting backtesting and live trading with the same strategy code.
docs.vectorbt: vectorbt is an open-source Python library for backtesting and analyzing trading strategies using vectorized (NumPy/pandas) operations for speed.
